case_title: WALTER RENNER VS. WOO HYUNG YOUN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RENNER, WALTER
